docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
ORDER REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DEFENDANT GRANTED**

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-08-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-08-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH. PLAINTIFF YOANN HISPA IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM. DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY TABITHA LANG (REPRESENTATIVE/LEGAL INVESTIGATIONS ASSOCIATE) VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D. 506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,921.00 FILED BY HISPA, YOANN AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-08-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HISPA, YOANN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. $878.32 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $878.32, PLAINTIFF IS FOUND NOT TO BE THE PREVAILING PARTY BASED ON EVIDENCE PRESENTED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-08-2023 - JUDGMENT. AS TO AWARD OF $0.00 IN COSTS, PLAINTIFF IS FOUND NOT TO BE THE PREVAILING PARTY BASED ON EVIDENCE PRESENTED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED. (D. 506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HISPA, YOANN AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF [AGENT FOR SERVICE - CSC LAWYERS INCORPORATING SERVICE - BECKY DEGEORGE] SERVED OCT-05-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
SC-109(AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR) TABITHA LANG FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
